response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role's core stack and responsibilities, though limited direct Nest.js or Vitest experience and basic German may pose minor gaps.
strengths: Strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven experience in AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Deep testing and DevOps background with Docker, CI/CD, and Git
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of relational database (PostgreSQL/MySQL) usage
Basic German may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
